description_long: This object is a dual-screen computer monitor setup with two rectangular, flat-panel displays joined at a slight inward angle, supported by a single central stand. The bezels around the screens are thin and uniform, giving the monitors a modern, minimalist appearance. The stand is a wide, flat base that provides stability, with a central vertical support connecting to the rear of both screens. The rear view reveals a clean, seamless back with no visible buttons or ports, emphasizing a streamlined design. The side profiles show the slimness of the screens and the depth of the stand's support structure. The entire object is finished in a matte black color, contributing to its professional and understated look.
description: A dual flat-panel computer monitor setup with thin bezels and a wide, flat central stand, finished in matte black.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, thin, black screens joined at a slight angle with minimal bezels and a wide, flat base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the screens and the depth of the central support structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the seamless back of both monitors and the central support connecting to the wide base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same slim profile and support structure as the other side.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and uniform in width, with a matte black finish and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat rectangular base with a single central vertical support, made of matte black material, providing stability without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
